rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `notMem` in `finrank_adjoin_simple_eq_two_of_sq_mem_notMem` violates Lean 4 / Mathlib snake_case convention (should be `not_mem`), a real and verifiable naming inconsistency in the diff that a maintainer would flag; Review 2 misses this entirely. The other findings are more stylistic/contested, but this one finding is sufficient to make the PR better if acted on.
